# **What problem are we solving?**

For DSP lender, finalising the values of additional details and decalarations that we need to take from the customer.

# **How do we measure success?**

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

Following will be the fields for additional details (in this order):

| Field | Possible values | Input type |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Marital status | Single/ Married | Radio |
| Select qualification | - Up to 12th pass
- Graduate
- Post graduate or higher
- Others. | Dropdown |
| Father's name | Customer's father's name | Text input |
| Mothers's name | Customer's mother's name | Text input |
| Select income range | - less than 3 lakhs
- 3 to 10 lakhs
- 10 to 25 lakhs
- more than 25 lakhs | Dropdown |
| Select employment status | - Salaried
- Self employed
- Business owner
- Others | Dropdown |
| Select loan end use | - Personal
- Business
- Investments
- Emergency | Dropdown |

Following will be the fields in verify KYC details:

1. Full name
2. Date of birth
3. Address
- [ ]  I confirm that I am a resident Indian.
- [ ]  I confirm that my current address is same as permanent address shown above.
